enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep affection and admiration, portraying the beauty of love through its lyrics.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In the film Azhagu Kutti Chellam, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Shakthisree Gopalan, known for her soulful voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Azhagu Kutti Chellam (Reprise) was composed by Ved Shankar, who is recognized for his melodic compositions.

When was this song released?

This song was released on December 30, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Azhagu Kutti Chellam (Reprise), the listener is taken on a romantic journey filled with tender emotions and heartfelt expressions. The song beautifully conveys the feelings of love and admiration, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. With its soothing melody and captivating lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track stands out as a significant piece in the film Azhagu Kutti Chellam, enhancing the romantic narrative of the story.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Azhagu Kutti Chellam (Reprise) is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and beauty. With Shakthisree Gopalan's enchanting vocals and Na Muthukumar's heartfelt lyrics, this song from the film Azhagu Kutti Chellam resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the soothing vibes that make this track a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
stanzaMeanings: Just seeing you is enough, my beautiful little one. This life will end, my beautiful little one.
What form does God take? I see you, you are that.
Just seeing you is enough, my beautiful little one. This life will end, my beautiful little one.
Who are you, who are you? I am the one. You have changed into yourself.
Who am I, who am I? You are the one I called.
I am a flower, you are the flower that has bloomed.
Breath is my life, always you.
Just seeing you is enough, my beautiful little one. This life will end, my beautiful little one.
When I hold you, I feel a little happiness here.
The earth blooms flowers for you. The clouds will rain for you.
I have come to play with you, holding the joy of heaven in my hands.
The meanings of joy are your kisses, I have become crazy about them.
Just hearing you speak is enough, all my sorrows will end, if your feet come home, I will live for you.
Just seeing you is enough, my beautiful little one. This life will end, my beautiful little one.
What form does God take? I see you, you are that.
Just seeing you is enough, my beautiful little one. This life will end, my beautiful little one.
